name: AIBOM: per P-7, fine-tunes.yaml entries are ingested into AIBOM as components with type:fine-tune-artifact
command:
mkdir -p compliance prompts && printf "- id: my-finetune
  base_model: claude-opus
  artifact_uri: https://x.com/ft.bin
  hash: sha256:S
" > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json --include-fine-tunes && grep "my-finetune" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
